Princess
Daenora Targaryen
Daenora and Aerion Targaryen by Lopata Four
Title Princess
Allegiance House Targaryen
Race Valyrian
Culture Crownlands
Born 196–216 AC[1]
Died In or after 232 AC[1]
Father Prince Rhaegel Targaryen[2]
Mother Alys Arryn[2]
Spouse Prince Aerion Targaryen[2]
Issue Maegor Targaryen[2]
Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Daenora Targaryen was the younger daughter of Prince Rhaegel Targaryen and Lady Alys Arryn. She had an older brother and sister, the twins Aelor and Aelora. Daenora was married to her cousin, Prince Aerion.[2]

History[ ]

Daenora married her cousin, Prince Aerion Targaryen, at an unknown point in time. Together, they had one son, Prince Maegor, who was born in 232 AC, and whose claim to the throne was disputed by the Great Council of 233 AC.[2][3]
